## Pull request quality bar

Please do not open drive-by, context-free, or purely "vibe-coded" pull requests.
PRs should be complete, reviewable, and tied to a clear problem.

Low-quality PRs may be closed without review if they:

- have no clear description, issue, or user-facing reason;
- contain a large unrelated code dump or broad rewrite;
- mix multiple unrelated changes in one PR;
- only change one or two lines without explaining the actual impact;
- include AI-generated code that was not reviewed and understood by the author;
- add behavior changes without tests, screenshots, logs, or reproduction notes.

If you are unsure about the direction, open an issue or discussion first.

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change? Keep it concrete. -->


## Problem / motivation

<!-- What bug, limitation, or user workflow does this solve? -->


## Linked issue or discussion

<!-- Link the issue, discussion, or Telegram discussion if applicable. -->

Fixes #


## Scope of changes

<!-- List the main changed areas. Mention intentionally untouched areas too if useful. -->

- 


## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- Required for UI/UX changes. Drag screenshots or short recordings here. -->


## Testing

<!-- Explain what you tested. Include device/emulator info for Android behavior. -->

- [ ] I ran the relevant checks locally.
- [ ] I tested the affected flow manually.
- [ ] I included screenshots/recordings for UI changes.
- [ ] I documented any testing gaps below.

Testing notes:


## Risk / compatibility

<!-- Mention migration risk, device/OEM impact, permissions impact, or parser edge cases. -->


## Contributor checklist

- [ ] This PR has one focused purpose (or a group of purposes).
- [ ] This PR does not include unrelated formatting, cleanup, or rewrites.
- [ ] I removed debug logs, local paths, temporary code, and unused dependencies.
- [ ] I updated localization strings for user-facing text. (if applicable)
- [ ] I updated documentation or issue templates if behavior changed.
- [ ] I reviewed every line, including AI-assisted/written code, and can explain it.
- [ ] I am ready to adjust the PR based on review instead of opening a replacement PR.
